title: Nursery Rhyme. CCCCLX. Love And Matrimony.
content:
"Little maid, pretty maid, whither goest thou?"
        "Down in the forest to milk my cow."
        "Shall I go with thee?" "No, not now;
        When I send for thee, then come thou."
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Unknown delivers a powerful performance in "Nursery Rhyme. CCCCLX. Love And Matrimony."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
